title: callitriche hamulata subvar. reflexa
intro: Callitriche hamulata subvar. reflexa, also known as water starwort, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Callitriche hamulata subvar. reflexa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although its efficacy and safety should be verified by a healthcare professional before consumption.
